title: phaulanthus helferi
intro: Phaulanthus helferi, a flowering plant species, is a type of shrub native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phaulanthus helferi include its potential to treat fever, pain, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infection. Herbal preparations of Phaulanthus helferi include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
